 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current strategy after Week 25 actions (Day 175)
-- **Cash after actions: $2.675M.** Active MRR now **$18.586M/mo** (S2 $15.854M, D_S07 $2.550M, E3 $159k, others small). Current-active billings due next 7d are **~$5.44M before churn**, materially higher than last week. Burn after actions ≈ **$4.85-5.0M/wk** (ops $393.5k/d incl targeted+global, dev $77.9k/d, ads $60k/d, capacity $28k/d, compute ~$120-150k/d + lead costs). Base Day182 cash expectation **~$3.7-4.3M without large enterprise closes**; enterprise low-offer repricing creates wide upside. Avoid new market discovery/R&D until cash >$6M, unless next week cash is clearly safe.
-- Week25 dashboard: individual subs **165,925** (+8,775 net; 11,947 new / 3,172 cancels), enterprise seats **4,006** (no new), usage **199.7M/wk**, no outage/overload, p95 peak 250ms. t6_2 completed Day170; global quality bonus now **1.9721** and conversions improved sharply.
-- **Week25 actions:** (1) Tested and then repriced/responded to **all 2,893 live enterprise leads / 2.046M seats** with low month-to-month land offers; verified **awaiting_after []**. (2) Ads now **S2 content $10k/d; D_S07 search $25k/d + LinkedIn $25k/d**. (3) Ops raised to **S2 $280k/d + D_S07 $85k/d**, other pods unchanged; total ops **$393.5k/d incl global**. (4) Quotas raised to **A 50k / B 5M / C 15M units/day**. (5) Social reply **id26** to D_S07 post 464: expanded paid-plan limits, pre-run estimates, clear no-silent-cap errors, custom burst pools.
-
-## Day175 config now in force
-- Prices **A=$79/B=$159/C=$349**; tiers **A=1/B=3/C=4**; quotas **A=50k, B=5M, C=15M**; capacity **tier6**. Keep tier6 unless peak usage >65M/day or active enterprise seats >~250k; then scale tier7 promptly.
-- Ads strength **0**. Targeted ads full replacement: **content_marketing S2 $10k/day; search_ads D_S07 $25k/day; LinkedIn D_S07 $25k/day.**
+## Current strategy after Week 26 actions (Day 182)
+- **Cash after actions: $3.950M.** Active MRR **$19.697M/mo** (S2 $15.971M, D_S07 $3.531M, E3 $160k, others tiny). Current-active billings due next 7d are **$3.742M before churn**, lower than Week25 collections, so expect a cash valley unless enterprise closes. After final actions burn ≈ **$5.1-5.4M/wk** (ops $428.5k/d incl global+targeted, dev $85.9k/d, ads $60k/d, capacity $28k/d, compute ~$130-160k/d + lead costs). Base Day189 cash without enterprise is roughly **$2.6-3.2M**. Do **not** start new R&D/discovery until cash >$6M; be ready to taper support/ads if cash approaches <$2M.
+- Week26 dashboard: individual subs **178,079** (+12,154 net; 16,709 new / 4,555 cancels), enterprise seats **4,041** (no new), usage **220.8M/wk**, no outage/overload, peak p95 232ms. Active MRR rose by $1.11M/wk despite high D_S07 first-renewal churn.
+- Competitor social this week showed multiple quality jumps (~+0.25 to +0.35). Current quality still converts S2/D_S07 well, but maintain dev focus and wait for pending t7/t4/t8 boosts.
+
+## Day182 final config in force
+- Prices **A=$79/B=$159/C=$349**; tiers **A=1/B=3/C=4**; quotas **A=50k, B=5M, C=15M**; capacity **tier6**. Keep tier6 unless active enterprise seats >~250k or peak usage >65M/day; then scale tier7 immediately.
+- Ads strength **0**. Targeted ads (full replacement): **content_marketing S2 $10k/day; search_ads D_S07 $25k/day; LinkedIn D_S07 $25k/day**. I initially tested $35k+$35k but cash-flow model was too tight; final reverted to proven $25k+$25k.
 - Promotions unchanged: global $0. S2 ongoing $0 / lead $10. D_S07 ongoing $60 + lead $30. D_S04 ongoing $70 + lead $20 plus by_group_plan D_S04 B/C +$20. S3 ongoing $40 + lead $50. S1 ongoing $60 + lead $20. D_S03/D_S05/D_S06 ongoing $70 + lead $20. D_S10 ongoing $50 + lead $20. Enterprise promos $0.
-- Ops targeted: **S2 $280k**, **D_S07 $85k**, E3 $10k, S3 $2k, D_S04 $2k, E2/D_E02/D_E07/D_E08 $1k each, D_E09/E1/S1 $0.5k each, D_S05/D_S06/D_S10 $0.3k each, D_S03 $0.1k = **$385.5k/day targeted + $8k global = $393.5k/day total ops**.
-- Dev unchanged: global $15k + targeted **S2 $18k**, D_S07 $12k, E3 $8k, D_E02 $6k, E2 $5k, D_E07 $4k, D_E08 $3k, D_S04 $2k, S3/D_E09/E1 $1k each, D_S05/D_S06/D_S10 $0.5k each, S1/D_S03 $0.2k each = **$77.9k/day total dev**.
+- Ops targeted final: **S2 $300k**, **D_S07 $100k**, E3 $10k, S3 $2k, D_S04 $2k, E2/D_E02/D_E07/D_E08 $1k each, D_E09/E1/S1 $0.5k each, D_S05/D_S06/D_S10 $0.3k each, D_S03 $0.1k = **$420.5k/day targeted + $8k global = $428.5k/day total ops**.
+- Dev targeted final: **D_S07 $20k** (raised for integration/API complaints), S2 $18k, E3 $8k, D_E02 $6k, E2 $5k, D_E07 $4k, D_E08 $3k, D_S04 $2k, S3/D_E09/E1 $1k each, D_S05/D_S06/D_S10 $0.5k each, S1/D_S03 $0.2k each = **$70.9k targeted + $15k global = $85.9k/day total dev**.
+- Social post **agent id27**, reply to D_S07 post 493: committed schema-locked exports, Tableau precision fix, expanded API docs, public p95/status alerts, 24h blocker SLA, and added D_S07 support/dev capacity.
 
 ## Support / individual growth
-- **D_S07 is now best growth engine.** Active **26,827** (1,444 A / 25,334 B / 49 C), MRR **$2.55M**. Week25 paid: LinkedIn $122.5k -> 7,490 leads / 4,282 subs / $375k MRR; search $122.5k -> 6,625 leads / 3,754 subs / $330k MRR. Paid conversion ~57%, B share ~86%, lpd LinkedIn **0.061**, search **0.054**. Scaled to $25k+$25k; watch if lpd <~0.035 or conversion <35%.
-- D_S07 support: open **3,567**, avg 0.04d, **d0 3,543**, ge2 24, ge7 5; opened/resolved last 7d **22,745/21,811**. Raised ops to $85k to prevent the d0 pile from becoming stale as ads scale.
-- **S2 remains cash engine but support-stressed and near cap.** Active **138,883** (56,456 A / 82,064 B / 363 C), MRR **$15.854M**. Week25 content ads $105k -> 2,347 leads / 1,720 subs / $222k MRR; network 1,792 leads / 1,327 subs / $170k MRR. Cancels improved but still high: **1,771 A + 972 B = $266.9k MRR lost**. Cut S2 ads to $10k and raised support.
-- S2 issues Day175: open **9,430**, avg 16.69d, ge2 4,002, **ge7 3,775, ge14 3,359, ge30 2,220**, d0 5,398; opened/resolved last 7d **44,441/45,550**. Total open fell, but stale ge7/ge14/ge30 rose; Day182 must check whether $280k ops finally reduces stale buckets.
-- Other organic segments after t6: D_S04 575 network leads -> 63 B subs (11%, $4.3k MRR), S3 452 -> 81 subs (18%, $10.2k MRR), D_S10 only 1; still do not buy ads outside S2/D_S07 until better evidence.
+- **D_S07 remains best acquisition engine but retention risk is real.** Active **38,633** (3,924 A / 34,601 B / 108 C), MRR **$3.531M**. Week26 paid: LinkedIn $175k -> 11,003 leads / 6,752 subs / $570k MRR; search $175k -> 9,489 leads / 5,950 subs / $497k MRR; paid conversion ~62%, B-heavy. LPD strong: LinkedIn **0.063**, search **0.054** (temporary dips to 0.034-0.042 on days 180-181, recovered day182). Final action kept $25k+$25k (not scaled) because first-billing churn and cash valley need proof.
+- **D_S07 retention warning:** cohorts created days146-152 now show B first-renewal retention only **~59%** (1,824 B cancelled vs 2,635 B still subscribed). These were earlier/lower-quality cohorts, but next week must check days153-159. If D_S07 B first-renewal retention remains <75%, consider lowering recurring D_S07 B by +$10 promo (ongoing promo $70, B=$89) and/or cutting ads.
+- D_S07 support Day182: open **5,408**, avg 0.12d, d0 5,164, ge2 124, ge7 25; opened/resolved last 7d **30,731/28,890**. Ops raised to $100k to keep d0 pile from aging while ads continue.
+- **S2 remains cash engine but stale support is worsening.** Active **139,114** (55,828 A / 82,896 B / 390 C), MRR **$15.971M**. Week26 content ads $70k -> 1,708 leads / 1,306 subs / $168k MRR; network -> 2,076 leads / 1,558 subs / $199k MRR. Week26 cancels **1,361 A + 1,268 B + 4 C = $288.9k MRR lost**.
+- S2 issues Day182: open **9,162** (down slightly), avg 20.36d, ge2 4,236, **ge7 4,066, ge14 3,775, ge30 2,727**, d0 4,892; opened/resolved **33,600/33,868**. Stale buckets still rose despite $280k; final raised to $300k. If ge7/ge14/ge30 do not fall by Day189, consider either another short support surge or accept/taper if cash is stressed.
 
 ## Enterprise
-- **ALWAYS query latest open enterprise turns before advancing; reply to every latest non-agent open thread including `system` new leads.** After Week25 actions, latest non-agent summary verified **[] / 0**.
-- All live enterprise leads now have latest agent offer dated Day175: total **2,893 leads / 2.046M seats**. By group: **E3 877/983k**, D_E07 473/386k, D_E02 745/331k, E2 392/206k, D_E08 222/94.7k, E1 101/28.9k, D_E09 83/15.9k. Turn mix: new week turn1 plus old threads advanced to turn2/turn3.
-- Current low-offer policy (use for new replies until evidence changes): **D_E02/D_E09 A$9/B$15/C$29; D_E07/D_E08/E2 A$15/B$25/C$49; E1 A$5/B$9/C$19; E3 A$19/B$29/C$49.** Previous higher offers produced no new accepts; low pricing is a recession land-grab test. Do **not** renegotiate the 3 active E3 accounts unless needed.
-- Active enterprise remains only **3 E3 B accounts / 3,991 seats / $159k MRR**. If low offers produce >250k active enterprise seats or service peak >65M/day, scale capacity tier7 immediately.
+- **ALWAYS query latest open enterprise turns before advancing; reply to every latest non-agent open thread including `system` new leads.** After Week26 enterprise actions, verified **awaiting_after []**.

Latest live pipeline now all agent age0. By group: **E3 1,135/1.258M**, D_E07 672/546.5k, E2 946/515.3k, D_E02 1,079/478.8k, D_E08 433/196.1k, E1 119/32.4k, D_E09 145/27.5k. Turn numbers now include old leads advanced up to E3 turn4; still no live non-agent waiting.
+- **Current enterprise offer policy for new replies until evidence changes (safe floors):** D_E02 A$15/B$25/C$49; D_E07 A$29/B$49/C$89; D_E08 A$25/B$39/C$69; D_E09 A$9/B$19/C$39; E1 A$5/B$12/C$25; E2 A$19/B$49/C$89; E3 A$29/B$49/C$79. Rationale: prior ultra-low B/C got 0 accepts and some high-usage B/C prices were near/below compute cost.

ok=err=0

    for x in br:
